# elite-brainstorming examples

## Example request

```text
/brainstorm Scale our customization framework quality and governance without slowing delivery.
```

## Expected shape

- objective + assumptions

- 12 ideas across safe/adjacent/bold archetypes

- scored top 3 with EV/confidence/reversibility

- falsifiable hypothesis + evidence threshold + kill criteria

- issue-ready delegated tasks + project board mapping

- specialist review plan with `(Agent: <name>)` entries

- brainstorming summary ticket draft
